source.name: Mock Danish Property Fixtures
source.provenanceNote: Contains deliberately fake/anonymized Danish demo records for local development only.
source.allowedUseSummary: Local development, demos, and automated tests only.
source.blockedUseSummary: Not official data. Do not use for real ownership decisions, scraping, enrichment, or public claims.
source.retentionSummary: Fixtures can be deleted at any time and must be replaced by documented lawful imports.
